title: Cosmic Horizons
description: A Space Mod Never seen before!!!!! Revolutionising and adding space to Minecraft....🚀💫
body:
_A space mod thats never seen before !!! ...This mod expanses and introduces "Space" to Minecraft in a really fun and technological way. The mod introduces many new Planets,Moons and Galaxies in a way never done before in the Blocky Game. _
**_MOD STAGE :- Very Alpha(can be only played in creative mode)_**

**|InterPlanetary/Galactic Expansion|**  The mod adds its own Render system bringing so called "Space" to life...... Players can now visit planets in a Space Nodule and feel the glorific expansion in terms of size while respecting your pc specs..... [Note]:- This mod renders the given planets irrecpective of render distance and can be played with an performance enhancing mod like sodium optifine and any others.

**|Planetary Exploration|** :- The mod adds its own system of gravity and adds dimensions for all planets and adds thier provided conditions while keeping the blocky game alive with minerals and new blocks.
![The cosmos awaits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e0d6226710ab80a4d74b1cabec995c19b025cd1.png)![Moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a7b8209264496dafd1da567da6301c12d6e7cb8.png)

**|Technological Expansion/Ingame Expansion|** :- The mod provides various new blocks with interactive Gui(s) and its own electricity systems and metal expansions.
![metals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93dc122d5b5c7da55018d24f88b34babaeb805d8.png)![Electric_System](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99f6c43fbf7517ff478ca352462be1460452fc80.png)
[https://streamable.com/a820dv](https://streamable.com/a820dv)

**|Exploration|** :- The mods also adds its own way to travel to space used space nodules which also come with different upgrades to survive in diffente conditions and go faster.
![engine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fefc1a75d514e093bb80c0ed93a840db8e95e170.png)![types of nodules](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4d4198e2df182e3900fa52e0e88783ebd35ba40.png)

**|Shader Support|**: using the latest oculusmod you can try out the complementary reimageined shaders.. the mod is compatible with any litbit shader..(warning this is in beta)
![on earth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11d87cb7fcc9fab0ffa687b34ea95cc53f3fda8f_0.webp)

![on earth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aed40e6b901160d35cfbda904bbdaa581b28f6a2.png)

**|Multiplayer Compatibility|**: The mod also supports multiplayer gameplay, allowing players to embark on space adventures together and explore the cosmos as a team.
|Fun Tidbits| :- The mod also adds other tidbits like y-level counters while in ship and so on.....

**|Adoon Support!!! |** :- The mod supports and adds its own datapack suport allowing people to make thier own galaxies and gui implementations while keeping the game theme intact alowing them to make use of the wonderfull rendering system. for more questions and bug reports visit our discord...... [https://discord.gg/cdc6sgEExF](https://discord.gg/cdc6sgEExF)
